title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission flow: granting "While Using the App" permission after initially denying opens FMD screen without further permission popups
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Poly headset connected.
2. On the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
3. From the menu, tap "Find My Device".
4. When the location permission popup appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Observe that the Find My Device screen shows a prompt to enable location access.
6. Tap "Enable Now" on the Find My Device screen.
7. When the system location permission dialog appears, select "While Using the App" to grant permission.
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The location permission popup appears at step 4. After tapping "Don't Allow", the FMD screen shows an "Enable Now" prompt. After tapping "Enable Now" and granting "While Using the App" permission, the Find My Device screen opens without any further permission windows.
